## Anti-Reduction Checklist

> **PR Completion Gate** — all items must be checked before this PR may be merged.

- [ ] No files deleted
- [ ] No tests removed or weakened
- [ ] No features simplified or scope-reduced
- [ ] No transparency features hidden or removed
- [ ] No governance rules weakened
- [ ] No model capabilities reduced
- [ ] Coverage >= baseline
- [ ] Test count >= baseline
- [ ] Six Hats review completed
- [ ] **CoVE audit passed (compact or full)** — run `scripts/verify_chain.py --cove` and paste output below
